items.title: Arsenal 2006 v 2026 - select your team
items.summary: How does the current Arsenal side measure up against the 2006 team who were last in a Champions League final? Take your pick.

items.title: Srpski mediji o prekinutom finalu u Novom Sadu: "Sramota", "Velika mrlja", "Skandal"
items.summary: SRPSKI mediji popratili su rukometno finale u zemlji tijekom kojeg je ozlijeđen i hrvatski rukometaš.

items.title: The most iconic Champions League final performances ranked
items.summary: Steven Gerrard in Istanbul? Gareth Bale's double? Teddy Sheringham or Ole Gunnar Solskjaer? Ranking the best Champions League final performances.

items.title: FNC 31 Beograd: Barbir i 'Joker' predvode spektakl. Evo gdje gledati i kada počinje event
items.summary: U Beogradu će se održati dvije borbe za titulu. Prva je ona između Ivice Truščeka i Kamila Kraske, koji će se boriti za pojas do 77 kilograma. U main eventu sučelit će se Đani Barbir i Aleksandar Ilić za pojas do 84 kg

items.title: Tko je Fran Mileta? Hrvatski rukometaš ozlijeđen je topovskim udarom u Srbiji
items.summary: FINALE srpskog rukometnog prvenstva prekinuto je zbog incidenta navijača. Hrvatski igrač Fran Mileta ozlijeđen je topovskim udarom, a Partizan je postao prvak službenim rezultatom.

items.title: Grobari bacili topovski udar koji je oglušio Hrvata: Evo tko je on i kako je reagirala Vojvodina...
items.summary: Skandal u Novom Sadu! Grobari bacili topovski udar koji je oglušio Frana Miletu, talentiranog hrvatskog rukometaša. Vojvodina napustila teren, Partizanu titula

items.title: 'It's been written' - Arsenal players look ahead to Champions League final
items.summary: Before the Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain on Saturday, Arsenal players Leandro Trossard, Myles Lewis-Skelly, Declan Rice and Eberechi Eze talk about what winning the trophy would mean to them.

items.title: Weekly sports quiz: Whose overhead kick is on a new £20 note?
items.summary: How much attention have you paid to what's happened in the world of sport over the past seven days?

items.title: Realove ikone podržale Pereza: 'Predsjedniče, za nas si najbolji'
items.summary: Perez je službeno predstavio kandidaturu za predsjednika Reala, a podršku su mu došli dati legendarni Ronaldo Nazario i Roberto Carlos. Izbori su zakazani za 7. lipanj

items.title: Rasulo u Milanu. Talijani: Sukob Allegrija i Ibrahimovića nije najšokantnija stvar
items.summary: U MILANU je došlo do fizičkog sukoba Ibrahimovića i Allegrija.

items.title: Pogledajte detonaciju koja je ozlijedila hrvatskog rukometaša. Vojvodina se oglasila
items.summary: FINALE u Novom Sadu je prekinuto nakon divljanja navijačke skupine beogradske momčadi.

items.title: Heroj Palacea u deliriju nakon finala: Svi smo dali sve od sebe
items.summary: Ponosan sam na sve u klubu, prošle i sadašnje, koji su nam pomogli da dođemo do mjesta gdje jesmo. Ovo je čisto zadovoljstvo, dodao je nakon Matete njegov suigrač Tyrick Mitchel

items.title: Source: Wemby warned for ditching reporters
items.summary: The NBA has warned Victor Wembanyama for violating media access rules after he did not speak to reporters following the Spurs' Game 5 loss, the league told ESPN.

items.title: Trump plans to attend NBA Finals game at MSG
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he is planning on attending an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next month.

items.title: Sources: Hawks GM Saleh gets promotion, deal
items.summary: The Hawks signed Onsi Saleh to a long-term contract extension and promoted him from general manager to president of basketball operations, it was announced on Wednesday.

items.title: Source: Lakers lay off over a dozen amid reorg
items.summary: The Lakers informed more than a dozen employees Wednesday they were being laid off as part of a reorganization under new franchise leadership, a source familiar with the situation told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Projected 1st-rounder Peat stays in draft...
items.summary: Arizona forward Koa Peat, a projected first-round pick, is keeping his name in the NBA draft, sources told ESPN on Wednesday.

items.title: Celtics' Mazzulla named NBA Coach of the Year
items.summary: Boston's Joe Mazzulla was named NBA Coach of the Year over finalists J.B. Bickerstaff and Mitch Johnson on Tuesday night, officially wrapping up the league's end-of-season awards schedule.

items.title: Sources: Atkinson to return as Cavs head coach
items.summary: Kenny Atkinson will return next season as the Cleveland Cavaliers coach, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

items.title: Hammon stands by Brunson take: Prove me wrong
items.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon didn't completely back down from her assertion that a player of Jalen Brunson's stature could lead a team to an NBA title, saying Brunson will have to prove her wrong.
